title: Easy Recipe
description: Adds alternative and/or utility recipes, inspired by the Quark mod.
body:
# What is this?

- No new recipes for the item or block that does not have a recipe in the vanilla game.
- Alternative recipes for multi-step crafting recipes, and somehow have reasonable logic.
- Utility crafting recipes, such as restoring to a whole block.

# Easy Recipe

A series of alternative and/or utility crafting recipes, that is: simplifications, block restores, and dyed block cleaning. The input/output amount is matched to the vanilla game; therefore, there should be no loss by using the alternatives.  
All recipes can be unlocked normally and seen in the recipe book.

The following section may not display all the recipes. Please visit the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/datapack/easy-recipe/gallery) for the complete display.

## Simplified recipe

To efficiently craft by reducing the steps of ingredient crafting, or as an alternative for convenience.

![Alternative recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OZTVlvL2/images/62adf289325f0f05af31d109a5e708b9b276446b.png)
![Alternative recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OZTVlvL2/images/ab9cd068f82c67b36229d1c129d133dffa63a9dc.png)
![Alternative recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OZTVlvL2/images/115b31d620b6d498220e6a8bf553417bfbdb563f.png)
![Alternative recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OZTVlvL2/images/0416e20d2541e4f2e80bf5d8f311951936d0f8f9.png)

## Restore recipe

Combines to restore a whole block.

![Restore recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OZTVlvL2/images/62b565d50caea6e30665e372459c1d3269e27080.png)

## Cleaning recipe

Consume a bucket of water to wash out the dye; every bucket can cleanse up to eight items.

![Cleaning recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OZTVlvL2/images/e83cecdcea94a6d2d35dce5ff564118024e36470.webp)

# Compatibility Info

- namespace: `ezrcp`
- item tags:
  - `ezrcp:stained_glass`
  - `ezrcp:stained_glass_panes`
